name: Reflex Dog Treats - Stick Treats, gain Free Chicken (3 Sticks x 11g) 33g
description: Reflex Dog Stick Treats with Chicken ?are? grain-free and made from delicious real meat. These high-protein, low-fat stick treats promote healthy chewing. Reward good behaviour with these fun and delicious treats made with the highest quality ingredients and bursting with flavour. Pack of 3 sticks. INGREDIENTS: Meat and animal derivatives (6% chicken meat), minerals. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 33.5 Oil Content (%) - 20 Crude Ash (%) - 10 Crude Fiber (%) - 2 Moisture Content (%) 28 FEEDING RECOMMENDATIONS: Treats may be given as an additional snack. This product does not replace full-dog food daily. Dog Size Nutrition Recommendation Small up to 1 stick Medium Up to 2 sticks Large up to 3 sticks
